name: sports-hub
description: 41 sports API providers, 396 tools — scores, stats, odds, esports, chess, motorsport, boxing, AFL and more, in one MCP server.
long_description: Sports Hub aggregates 41 independent sports data APIs behind a single MCP server. By default it loads the `free` preset (19 no-key providers, ~165 tools) so it works with zero configuration. Set `SPORTS_HUB_PROVIDERS` to a preset (free, us-major, soccer, f1, motorsport, esports, odds, cricket, golf, chess) or `all`, and add API keys only for the providers you need.

providers.title: Providers / preset
providers.description: Comma-separated providers or a preset (free, us-major, soccer, f1, motorsport, esports, odds, cricket, golf, chess, all). Leave as 'free' for no-key providers only.

the_odds_api_key.title: The Odds API key (optional)
the_odds_api_key.description: Free key from the-odds-api.com — enables the `odds_` tools.

api_football_key.title: API-Football key (optional)
api_football_key.description: Free key from api-football.com — enables the `apifootball_` tools.

pandascore_token.title: PandaScore token (optional)
pandascore_token.description: Free token from pandascore.co — enables the `pandascore_` esports tools.
